Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Yaping Suns Attendance At: 1) Physical Examination And; 2) Mental Examination; And For Leave To Conduct Physical Examination And Mental Examination Of Plaintiff And Request For Monetary Sanct
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):

Atty. EDGAR W. HAWKYARD, Esq. of Jeanette N. Little & Associates (Tel: 925-225-6838) for defendants Rick Hems Productions, Ricky Marvin Hems, and Geoffrey Matias Ayupan;
Atty. Jessica N. Marshall, Esq. of PACIFIC COAST TRIAL LAW FIRM (Tel: 858-952-1901)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS GEOFFREY AYUPAN, RICK HERNS PRODUCTIONS, and RICKY HERNS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Yaping Sun's Attendance At: 1) Physical Examination And; 2) Mental Examination; And For Leave To Conduct Physical Examination And Mental Examination Of Plaintiff And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Both parties stipulate to this matter being decided by a pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, defense and plaintiff's counsel (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Defense counsel informs the court and the counsel for the plaintiffs of the scheduled examinations dates: one for physical and second date for the mental aspects (Plaintiff/father on 5/24 and 5/25. Plaintiff/Son on 5/23 and 5/24).

The Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling

The Court adopts its tentative ruling in part.
The motion is granted, subject to agreement between the parties as to the new dates of the examinations. The request for Sanctions is Taken Under Submission. Defendant's counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order, code compliant,to opposing counsel for approval as to form, and then to the pro tem judge in Word format, to JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com. The court will modify the order should sanctions be ordered.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Court Reporter: Barrie Hart CSR:6954 (Email: bhart@bayareatrialreporter.com . Tel: 415-328-6644)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GEOFFREY AYUPAN, RICK HERNS PRODUCTIONS, and RICKY HERNS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Weiru Yang's Attendance At: 1) Physical Examination And; 2) Mental Examination; And For Leave To Conduct Physical Examination And Mental Examination Of Plaintiff And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Both parties stipulate to this matter being decided by a pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, defense and plaintiff's counsel (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Defense counsel informs the court and the counsel for the plaintiffs of the scheduled examinations dates: one for physical and second date for the mental aspects (Plaintiff/father on 5/24 and 5/25. Plaintiff/Son on 5/23 and 5/24).

Parties submit arguments on the defendant's request for sanctions.

No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS GEOFFREY AYUPAN, RICK HERNS PRODUCTIONS, and RICKY HERNS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Yaping Sun's Attendance At: 1) Physical Examination And; 2) Mental Examination; And For Leave To Conduct Physical Examination And Mental Examination Of Plaintiff And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendants stipulate to this matter being decided by a pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and defense counsel (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Defense counsel indicates that he believed the tentative ruling for this matter was to
appear. The Court informs defense counsel that the tentative ruling is to grant the motion in part and deny the request for sanctions. Since defense counsel wishes to argue the denial of sanctions and plaintiff's counsel is not present, the Court permits this matter to be continued to tomorrow, May 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. on the Discovery Calendar. The Court instructs defense counsel to inform plaintiff's counsel of the continuance.
